name: Data Retention Policy.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
POL-033  Data Retention Policy
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Data Retention Policy
Retention schedule for legal, audit, and control-evidence records.
Document ID
POL-033
Owner
General Counsel
Version
2.0
Effective Date
2024-01-08
Classification
Internal Use
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are
fictional.
Purpose
This policy sets minimum retention periods for corporate records, compliance evidence, audit artifacts, contract files, and
system-operational data required to support internal governance and regulatory obligations.
Retention Schedule
Record Category
Minimum Retention
Repository Expectation
Executed contracts and DPAs
7 years after expiration or
termination
Legal contract repository
Access-review evidence and
approvals
3 years after review
completion
GRC evidence vault with owner and review date
Internal audit reports and NCRs
5 years after closure
Audit repository with linked corrective actions
Security telemetry
12 months unless stricter
requirement applies
Central SIEM / immutable archive
Board and committee minutes
Permanent corporate
record
Board portal and secretary archive
Evidence Handling Rules
●
Evidence packages must preserve provenance, owner, review date, and relation to the control period being tested.
●
Deletion or purge of auditable evidence must be documented and approved by the control owner and Legal.
●
Documents transmitted by email remain evidence only if exported or archived into the approved repository.
